gate_approach: MAMES selected as gate guide (Mathematics Education Secondary, solid size, no capstone). All 9 guides parsed to characterize the full family before gate decision.

parser_changes.description: Capstone dict in parse_capstone() was missing 'prerequisite_mentions' and 'certification_prep_mentions' keys. _scan_description_mentions() raised KeyError when capstone description matched a prereq pattern. Fix: added both keys (empty lists) to the capstone dict before calling _scan_description_mentions(). MAMEK6 triggered the crash; MBA, MHA, BSCSIA had capsones but did not crash because their capstone descriptions did not match prereq patterns.
parser_changes.scope: General — affects all guides with capstone sections

guides.degree_title: Master of Arts in Mathematics Education (Secondary)
guides.notes: Gate guide. Clean parse. Sections: Standard Path, Areas of Study, Accessibility.

guides.degree_title: Master of Arts, English Language Learning (PreK-12)
guides.metadata_format: footer (partial — page_count=0; older format lacks page count in footer)
guides.notes: Oldest guide version in family (201501). page_count=0 is cosmetic — no page count in footer. Phase A manifest flagged a possible Field Experience section; this was not triggered in actual parse. Content intact and correct.

guides.reconciliation: 10/10 clean (9 AoS courses + 1 capstone = 10 SP rows)
guides.notes: Has capstone section. Triggered the capstone KeyError bug (Session 19 fix). Post-fix: parses correctly. AoS course count (9) plus capstone (1) matches SP row count (10) exactly.

guides.degree_title: Master of Arts in Mathematics Education (Middle Grades 5-9)
guides.capstone_title: MA, Mathematics Education (5-9) Teacher Performance Assessment
guides.notes: Has capstone section with 12 competency bullets. Post-fix: parses correctly.

guides.degree_title: Master of Arts in Science Education (Middle Grades)
guides.notes: 9 AoS groups (highest in family) — science content is broken into subject-specific groups (Science, Chemistry, Biology, Geosciences, etc.).

guides.degree_title: Master of Arts in Science Education (Secondary Biology)
Master of Arts in Science Education (Secondary Chemistry)
Master of Arts in Science Education (Secondary Earth Science)
Master of Arts in Science Education (Secondary Physics)

structural_notes: SP format: 3-column with CUs and Term. Phase A manifest incorrectly detected 'has_cu_values: false' and 'has_term_structure: false' for all education_ma guides — Phase A detection was imperfect for these guide versions. Actual parsed data contains correct CU and Term fields.

AoS group structure is consistent with other education/teaching families: subject-specific groups (Mathematics Content, Science, Biology Content, etc.) plus Research and Teacher Performance Assessment groups.
2 guides have capstone sections (MAMEK6, MAMEMG). The capstone parser was broken for capsones whose descriptions contain prereq-pattern text. Session 19 fix resolved this.

MAELLP12 (version 201501, oldest guide in family): page_count=0 because older guide format lacks page count in footer. Content is intact and correct. Phase A manifest flagged a possible Field Experience section heading — this was not present in the actual guide structure and did not affect the parse.
Group names in JSON output use 'group' key (not 'name'). This is consistent with all other families.
AoS group counts vary widely (2–9 groups) reflecting the subject-specific specialization structure of each degree. This is expected and correct.
No source-artifact SP failures. No parser limitations affecting this family.
gate_result: PASS — all 9 guides HIGH confidence, 0 anomalies, 0 warnings. Family is structurally clean and rollout-ready.

recommendation.summary: education_ma is the cleanest family to date: 9/9 HIGH, 0 anomalies, 0 warnings, 0 empty descriptions, 0 empty competency lists across all guides. Full rollout is warranted. No deferred guides, no parser limitations, no source artifacts.
recommendation.parser_change_description: Session 19 capstone fix required (MAMEK6 triggered KeyError). Fix applied and regression-verified. No further parser changes needed for this family.
recommendation.downstream_exclusions: None. All 9 guides are safe for downstream use.
recommendation.next_session_recommendation: Reassess Phase D readiness after education_ma rollout. education_ma pushes artifact coverage to 89/115 and family-validated coverage to 87/115. Remaining unvalidated families include endorsement (8), nursing_msn (3), nursing_pmc (3), nursing_rn_msn (3+), nursing_ug (2), education_grad (2), accounting_ma specializations (3 deferred). These carry higher structural uncertainty.
